subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Even as the Sun of Truth, with intense brilliance and heat, hath risen from the horizon of the realm beyond unto the realm of being [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان چون شمس حقیقت بضیاء و حرارتی شدید از افق لامکان بر امکان
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @martyrs and martyrdom, @firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @Manifestation of God as sun, @service to others; to the Cause of God
